brief_summary: Inline chart for the H2 'What changes when the win condition becomes the floor'. Three vertical bars on a price y-axis (annotated $100/$150/$200/$300): a faded hatched 2016 bar at $300+ marked 'custom-only territory'; a coral-emphasized 2026 bar at $150 with a bronze top-edge line marking the now-shipping spec floor; a dashed forecast bar at ~$99 marked 'forecast — none shipped yet' with a coral italic '?' glyph inside. A coral trajectory arrow swoops from 2016 to the forecast. A coral '— thock floor —' caption rides a coral wash band across the chart at the $150 level. Numbers come directly from the article body and the 'What we're watching' forecast section — no fabricated data.
data_sources: apps/web/src/content/articles/acoustic-spec-rise.mdx — '$300 custom' (paragraph: 'In 2016 a thocky board…'), '$150 prebuilt' (lede, body, 'reader picking a $150 prebuilt in 2022'), '$99 hypothetical' (forecast: 'A wired, plastic-cased gasket-mount prebuilt with factory-lubed switches and a foam stack at $99')
